summary: Iteration 43 testing complete. All requested features verified: 1) ProductsPage horizontal filters bar with category dropdown, origin country dropdown, price range inputs, free shipping toggle, and more filters button, 2) Certification filters (Halal, Kosher, Vegan, Gluten-Free, Sugar-Free, Organic) work correctly, 3) Products grid uses full width with 5 columns on XL screens, 4) Mobile filters drawer works correctly, 5) ProductDetailPage displays correctly with producer info section, 6) AI chat widget z-index is z-40 (not z-50) and does not obstruct filters or main content, 7) Filter active tags appear and can be cleared individually.

issues: Some TEST_ products have broken image placeholders - test data issue, not a bug

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified all UI changes: 1) ProductsPage now has horizontal filters bar at top instead of sidebar - includes category dropdown, origin country dropdown, price range inputs, free shipping toggle, and 'More filters' button that expands certification filters. 2) Products grid uses full width with up to 5 columns on XL screens. 3) Mobile filter drawer preserved for small screens. 4) AI chat widget z-index reduced from z-50 to z-40 to prevent overlapping main content. 5) ProductDetailPage shows producer info section with 'Vendido por' header.
